name: android-vuln-analyzer
description: Automated Android vulnerability analysis, reproduction, and hunting framework. Supports both reproducing known vulnerabilities from reports and actively hunting for specific vulnerability types using pre-built patterns.
author: Security Research
capabilities: Vulnerability reproduction from reports (CVE, bug bounty reports)
Targeted vulnerability hunting (SQL injection, secrets, WebView, etc.)
SQL injection and path traversal detection
Comprehensive security reporting with CVSS scoring
Knowledge base generation (prompt.md for future reuse)
examples: Analyze an Android APK for exported Activity vulnerabilities
Generate exploit PoC for account takeover
